description:
Calculate the Crown-to-Root ratio for the Maxillary Right Central Incisor (Tooth #8). 

Starting with the loaded patient scan in Blue Sky Plan:
1. Navigate to Tooth #8 (Upper Right Central Incisor).
2. Align the cross-sectional view to the long axis of the tooth (corrected sagittal view).
3. Measure the **Crown Height** (Incisal Edge to CEJ).
4. Measure the **Root Length** (CEJ to Apex).
5. Calculate the ratio: Root Length / Crown Height.
6. Save a screenshot of the measured view to `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tooth_8_ratio.png`.
7. Create a report at `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ratio_report.txt` with the format:
